metadata.description: Deterministic Mermaid projection tooling over governed canonical workflow inputs, with bounded reverse and narrative outputs that remain non-authoritative.
metadata.summary: Render, reverse, and narrate Mermaid and governed workflow projections.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Render Workflow As Mermaid
capabilities.description: Render a governed workflow JSON input to Mermaid flowchart text. Reads from --input or stdin.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Optional workflow JSON file path. When omitted, reads workflow JSON from stdin.

output.description: Mermaid flowchart projection derived from the governed workflow input.

capabilities.name: Reverse Mermaid
capabilities.description: Reverse Mermaid flowchart TD text into a bounded workflow-graph projection report. Reads from --input or stdin.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Optional Mermaid file path. When omitted, reads Mermaid text from stdin.

output.description: Bounded workflow graph semantics derived from Mermaid node IDs, labels, and edges.

capabilities.name: Narrate Mermaid Or Workflow
capabilities.description: Narrate Mermaid text or governed workflow JSON as a concise derived report. Reads from --input or stdin.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Optional Mermaid or workflow JSON file path. When omitted, reads from stdin.

output.description: Concise narrative explanation of the workflow or Mermaid graph.

constraints.description: Mermaid output, reverse projections, and narrative reports remain derived projections and must not be described as canonical workflow authority.
Reverse output is a bounded workflow-graph-semantics report, not full canonical workflow reconstruction.

triggers.description: When work involves Mermaid projection tooling.
When canonical workflow artifacts need Mermaid rendering or explanation.
